title.ko: 선철의 처리, 예. 정제, 연철 또는 강의 제조; 철계합금의 용융상태에서의 처리
title.en: PROCESSING OF PIG-IRON, e.g. REFINING, MANUFACTURE OF WROUGHT-IRON OR STEEL; TREATMENT IN MOLTEN STATE OF FERROUS ALLOYS

Removing impurities other than carbon, phosphorus, or sulfur
Constructional features of mixers for pig-iron
Manufacture of cast-iron
Making spheroidal graphite cast-iron
Manufacture of wrought-iron or wrought-steel

title.ko: 탄소강, 예. 보통연강, 중탄소강 또는 주강의 제조
title.en: Manufacture of carbon steel, e.g. plain mild steel, medium carbon steel, or cast-steel

Processes yielding slags of special composition

Blowing through the bath (C21C0005350000 takes precedence)

Processes yielding slags of special composition

title.ko: 타 방법에 의한 강의 제조(직접법에 의한 용강의 제조 C21B 13/00)
title.en: Manufacture of steel by other methods (making liquid steel by direct processes C21B0013000000)

title.ko: 그룹 C21C 1/00-C21C 5/00에 포함되지 않은 용융철합금, 예.강의 처리 (주조중의 용융금속의 처리 B22D 1/00, 27/00)
title.en: Treating molten ferrous alloys, e.g. steel, not covered by groups C21C0001000000-C21C0005000000 (treating molten metals during moulding B22D0001000000, B22D0027000000)
Removing impurities by adding a treating agent
Deoxidising, e.g. killing
Dephosphorising; Desulfurising
Decarburising
Treatment with gases (C21C0007060000, C21C0007064000, C21C0007068000 take precedence)

title.ko: 처리제로서의 슬래그 또는 용제(flux)의 사용(7/06, 7/064, 7/068이 우선)
title.en: Use of slags or fluxes as treating agents (C21C0007060000, C21C0007064000, C21C0007068000 take precedence)
Handling in vacuum
